case_title: DURAN,GEORGE VS MCCORMACK SCHMICKS SCP III,INC. et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,750.00 FILED BY DURAN,GEORGE AS TO DEFENDANT MCCORMACK SCHMICKS SCP III,INC. KULETOS, PAT RESTAURANT INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-27-1994 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT MAIL TO CT CORP AUTH AGENT FOR RECEIPT OF PROCESS C/O MCCOMACK SCGHMICKS CP III INC RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DURAN,GEORGE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCCORMACK SCHMICKS SCP III,INC. KULETOS, PAT RESTAURANT INC. $3,750.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,770.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERTIFFIED MAIL TO CHARLOTTA DAVIS RETURNED SIGNED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT MCCORMACK SCHMICKS SCP III,INC. KULETOS, PAT RESTAURANT INC.
